CustomField.label: Customer
CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_670, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_670)) + '/lightning/r/' + IF(ISBLANK(Contact__c),('Lead/' + Lead__c),('Contact/' + Contact__c)) + '/view' , IF(ISBLANK(Contact__c),TRIM(Lead__r.FirstName + ' ' + Lead__r.MiddleName + ' ' + Lead__r.LastName),TRIM(Contact__r.FirstName + ' ' + Contact__r.MiddleName + ' ' + Contact__r.LastName)) )
